title: Gyeran Mari Korean Rolled Omelette

seo.title: Gyeran Mari: Easy Korean Rolled Omelette Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make delicious Gyeran Mari, the classic Korean rolled omelette. This easy recipe brings authentic Korean breakfast to your kitchen. Perfect for any meal!
longTailKeywords: how to make Gyeran Mari Korean Rolled Omelette
best Korean rolled omelette recipe at home
lowCompetitionKeywords: simple Gyeran Mari recipe with vegetables
seo.h1: Gyeran Mari: Authentic Korean Rolled Omelette Recipe
h2Headings: What is Gyeran Mari Korean Rolled Omelette?
Ingredients You Need for Gyeran Mari
Step-by-Step Instructions to Make Gyeran Mari
Pro Tips for the Best Gyeran Mari Results
Serving Suggestions for Korean Rolled Omelette
seo.imageAlt: A perfectly cooked Gyeran Mari, a Korean rolled omelette, sliced and garnished on a plate.
seo.imageCaption: Enjoy this delicious and visually appealing Gyeran Mari, a staple Korean rolled omelette perfect for breakfast or a side dish.

description: Gyeran Mari is a beloved Korean rolled omelette, known for its soft texture and beautiful layered appearance. This versatile dish is often enjoyed as a side dish for any meal, a popular breakfast item, or packed in lunchboxes. Its subtle savory flavor makes it a comforting and satisfying addition to your table.

instructions.title: Prepare the Egg Mixture
instructions.text: In a medium bowl, whisk the eggs until well combined. Add the finely diced carrot, chopped green onion, salt, and a pinch of black pepper. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.

instructions.title: Heat the Pan
instructions.text: Heat a non-stick rectangular or round pan (about 8-10 inches) over medium-low heat. Add a small amount of cooking oil and spread it evenly across the pan surface using a paper towel. This ensures a thin, non-stick layer.

instructions.title: Pour the First Layer
instructions.text: Pour about 1/4 to 1/3 of the egg mixture into the hot pan, tilting the pan to coat the bottom thinly and evenly. Let it cook until the bottom is set but the top is still slightly wet and pliable, about 1-2 minutes.

instructions.title: Start Rolling the Omelette
instructions.text: Once the egg layer is mostly set but still flexible, use a spatula to gently roll the omelette from one end to the other, forming a tight log. Push the rolled omelette to one side of the pan, leaving space for the next layer.

instructions.title: Add Subsequent Layers
instructions.text: Add a tiny bit more oil to the empty part of the pan if needed. Pour another 1/4 to 1/3 of the egg mixture into the pan, making sure some of it seeps under the rolled omelette log to connect the layers. Cook until set, then roll the existing omelette over the new layer, continuing the rolling process. Repeat with the remaining egg mixture until all layers are incorporated.

instructions.title: Cook Through and Shape
instructions.text: Once all the egg mixture is rolled, continue to cook the Gyeran Mari for another 1-2 minutes, gently pressing it with the spatula to ensure it is cooked through and holds its beautiful layered shape. Ensure all sides are lightly golden.

instructions.title: Slice and Serve
instructions.text: Carefully transfer the cooked Gyeran Mari to a cutting board. Let it cool for a minute or two, then slice it into 1-inch thick pieces using a sharp knife. Serve warm as a side dish, for breakfast, or in a lunchbox.

tips: Use a non-stick pan and cook over medium-low heat to prevent burning and ensure even cooking, allowing for easier rolling and a perfectly golden exterior.
For a richer flavor or variation, you can add a tiny splash of mirin, a pinch of sugar, finely chopped ham, or shredded seaweed (gim) to the egg mixture.
Let the Gyeran Mari cool slightly on a cutting board for a minute or two before slicing. This helps it set, holds its shape better, and prevents tearing.
article: Gyeran Mari Korean Rolled Omelette is a beloved Korean Breakfast Recipes dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
